summary: Tested new Garantías and Liquidaciones features. All backend APIs working correctly (12/13 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend correctly displays warranty orders with GARANTÍA badge and parent link.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - non-blocking, same as iteration 1

seed_data_creation: Created master user via /api/auth/emergency-access. Created warranty orders via POST /api/ordenes/{id}/crear-garantia
context_for_next_testing_agent: Garantías and Liquidaciones features tested. Master user created: master@test.local/Master2026!. 3 warranty orders created from parent order e522a87a-8c1f-4d73-929a-bc4e5ff1bc45. Excel import tested with openpyxl-generated test file.
verified_features: POST /api/ordenes/{id}/crear-garantia creates dependent warranty order with inherited fields
Warranty order has numero_orden_padre referencing parent order
Warranty order inherits: cliente_id, dispositivo, cliente_nombre, etc.
POST /api/liquidaciones/importar-excel processes Excel and auto-crosses codes
POST /api/liquidaciones/marcar-pagados marks multiple as paid (validates empty list)
Frontend OrdenDetalle shows 'Órdenes de Garantía' section with clickable links
Frontend OrdenDetalleHeader shows GARANTÍA badge with 'Ver original' link when es_garantia=true
Navigation between parent and warranty orders works correctly
features_not_fully_tested: Liquidaciones modal after Excel import (requires master login which admin doesn't have access to /crm/liquidaciones)
Navigation after creating warranty (creates correctly but navigation test not executed)
